case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. SACCOMANO, ROGER J.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SACCOMANO, ROGER J.
